rules.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-normal font-serif tracking-tight text-text_primary
rules.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-normal font-serif tracking-tight text-text_primary

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for sections.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: None. Use 1px solid borders for separation.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento grids or simple flex columns for dashboard. The drafting page is a split view: 1/3 Chat, 2/3 Draft.

buttons.primary: bg-[#8FAF9A] text-[#161B22] font-sans font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#262E3A] text-[#F3EFE6] px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#1E2530] transition-colors
buttons.attention: bg-[#D9714B] text-[#161B22] font-sans font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.copy_rules: Plain, specific, direct. No 'Submit'. Examples: 'Publish to site', 'Save voice profile', 'Remind me later'.

status_pills.needs_attention: border border-[#D9714B] text-[#D9714B] font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded inline-block
status_pills.steady: border border-[#8FAF9A] text-[#8FAF9A] font-mono text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded inline-block

draft_panel.description: The hero interaction. Looks like a printed page or notebook.
draft_panel.styles: bg-[#F3EFE6] text-[#161B22] rounded-lg p-8 md:p-12 font-sans shadow-none h-full overflow-y-auto

onboarding.features: Paste/upload samples area, 'what do you write about and who for' text area. Voice summary confirmation screen.
onboarding.tone: Warm, intellectual. Big Fraunces headings. Use paper cream bg for text areas.

dashboard.layout: Grid or list view for drafts. Minimal calendar.
dashboard.features: Prominent 'New draft' button. List items show status pills (IBM Plex Mono). Empty state: 'Write your first draft.', not an apology.

brainstorm_draft.layout: Split screen. Left: Chat/Co-pilot (bg: surface). Right: Draft Panel (bg: paper_cream).
brainstorm_draft.features: Live updating text. Chat feels like messaging an editor.
brainstorm_draft.tone: Focused, functional, like a writing room.

review_publish.features: Stacked preview and actions. Buttons: 'Publish to site' (Sage), 'Remind me later' (Secondary).

settings.layout: Simple list of sections in a narrow container.
settings.features: Manage connected Sanity project, notification preferences, voice profile editor.

images.description: Workspace with typewriter, for editorial empty state or onboarding ambiance if needed.
Artistic black and white portrait for the solo expert's profile picture.

media.icons: lucide-react for minimal, stroke-based icons. Use at 1.5px stroke width.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text on paper_cream has high contrast. Ensure text on background has high contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Extend tailwind.config.js with the custom colors provided in the colors section.
Import Fraunces, Inter, and IBM Plex Mono fonts in your index.css.
Avoid box-shadow utilities; instead, rely on 1px solid borders (#262E3A) for depth and separation.
For the main drafting panel on the brainstorm page, make the background paper cream (#F3EFE6) with dark ink text (#161B22) to simulate a notebook page.
Use exact, plain, specific copy for buttons (e.g., 'Publish to site', 'New draft'). No generic 'Submit' buttons.
Status pills MUST be styled using the coral (#D9714B) for needs attention/drafting, and sage (#8FAF9A) for ready/published.
Empty states should invite action without apologizing.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for testability.
